name: Rogz Alleycat Safety Collar Small Purple (Cb16-E)
shortDescription: Crafted from high-quality, snag-proof webbing , this collar is built to withstand daily wear while remaining soft and comfortable. A highly reflective finish enhances visibility during night-time adventures, helping to keep your cat safe after dark. Reflective | Snag-Proof | Breakaway Safety Buckle
description: The  Rogz AlleyCat Safety Collar  is the ideal choice for everyday wear and identification, offering both safety and durability for your feline friend. Crafted from  high-quality, snag-proof webbing , this collar is built to withstand daily wear while remaining soft and comfortable. A  highly reflective finish  enhances visibility during night-time adventures, helping to keep your cat safe after dark. Featuring the  Rogz Safe lock breakaway buckle  with  three adjustable load settings , the collar is designed to release under enough strain allowing your cat to safely escape if the collar becomes caught. With an 11mm width  and  adjustable neck size from 20 to 30cm , it’s perfect for kittens and small adult cats.  Key Features: Reflective webbing  for increased night-time visibility Snag-proof and durable  for everyday use Breakaway buckle  with 3 safety release settings Adjustable fit : 20–30cm neck size | Width : 11mm Ideal for  kittens and small cat breeds Keep your cat safe and seen after dark with  Rogz AlleyCat Safety Collar  designed for both function and flair.
